scope_note: QA Keely Triune Cert family [153]: maps Keely's three vibratory modes (Enharmonic/Dominant/Harmonic) to QA three orbits (Satellite/Singularity/Cosmos). DOMINANT=SINGULARITY (neutral center=fixed point), ENHARMONIC=SATELLITE (bounded=8-cycle), HARMONIC=COSMOS (expansive=24-cycle). {0,3,6} mod 9 = singularity = Tesla 3-6-9. LCM(1,8,24)=24. Source: svpwiki.com (Keely/Pond), Brinton three Laws of Being.
